message:
feat(engine): direct simple INSERT fast path bypassing VDBE for single-row inserts

Add a PreparedDirectSimpleInsert optimization that evaluates INSERT value
expressions directly and writes to the B-tree cursor without compiling or
executing a VDBE program. This eliminates instruction dispatch, register
allocation, and opcode interpretation overhead for the common case of
single-row INSERTs with literal/placeholder/computed-expression values.

Direct simple INSERT fast path (connection.rs):
- Add PreparedDirectSimpleInsert struct storing root_page, rowid alias
  column index, row value expressions, column metadata, and conflict action
- Add prepared_direct_simple_insert_plan() that analyzes an INSERT statement
  at prepare time: eligible if single-row VALUES, no indexes, no CHECK
  constraints, no generated columns, no autoincrement sequence management,
  row width matches table width, and all value expressions are "supported"
  (literals, placeholders, binary/unary ops, casts, CASE, function calls,
  LIKE, JSON access — no column refs, subqueries, or RAISE)
- Add execute_prepared_direct_simple_insert() that: evaluates each value
  expression via eval_expr_with_subqueries, enforces STRICT type validation,
  handles explicit rowid extraction, enforces NOT NULL constraints, applies
  type affinity, opens a B-tree cursor on the root page, inserts the
  serialized record, and handles OR IGNORE/REPLACE/ABORT conflict actions
- Falls back to full VDBE execution on NotImplemented errors (graceful
  degradation for edge cases the fast path doesn't handle)
- Wire into execute_precompiled_prepared_insert: try direct path first,
  fall back to execute_table_program_dml_with_reuse on failure
- Add type_affinity_for_direct_insert() mapping affinity chars to TypeAffinity
- Extend eval_expr_with_subqueries with: Placeholder (bind parameter
  resolution), Collate (passthrough), Like/Glob/Match (pattern matching),
  JsonAccess (-> and ->> operators via eval_scalar_fn)
- Add eval_numbered_placeholder_param() helper for bind parameter lookup
- Import JsonArrow, TypeAffinity from AST/types crates

MemDatabase hydration tracking (engine.rs):
- Add memdb_rows_loaded field to VdbeEngine — tracks whether the attached
  MemDatabase contains fully hydrated rows or just a schema-only mirror
- Add set_memdb_rows_loaded() setter, propagated from Connection
- Fix Opcode::Count for storage cursors: only use MemDatabase row count
  as fast path when memdb_rows_loaded is true AND cursor is not writable
  AND not a time-travel cursor — prevents returning 0 for tables with real
  pager-backed rows but empty schema-only MemDatabase mirrors
- Make MemDatabase::upsert_row() pub (needed by direct insert path)
- Add test: test_count_on_writable_storage_cursor_ignores_hydrated_memdb_fast_path

Formatting and comment fixes:
- Fix compat_persist.rs comment: clarify that the extra allocated page is
  benign (SQLite tolerates trailing empty pages, page_count header is correct)
- Fix import line wrapping in connection.rs and test module imports
- Fix StatementReuseHotPathProfileGuard references in GROUP BY tests to use
  fully qualified path (super::pager_routing_tests::)

Tests:
- test_prepared_insert_precomputes_direct_simple_insert_plan: verifies plan
  presence after prepare
- test_prepared_direct_simple_insert_executes_inside_explicit_transaction:
  3-row insert within BEGIN/COMMIT, verifies rowid and name columns
- test_prepared_direct_simple_insert_canonicalizes_placeholders_once:
  unnamed ? placeholders mapped correctly across multiple executions
- test_prepared_direct_simple_insert_enforces_not_null: NOT NULL violation
  returns correct error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
